# 🏢 The Agency Roster — Pack Premium

## 24 AI Agent Skills for Hermes Agent

Build the future, one commit at a time.

---

### 🔴 Engineering Division (8 agents)

| Agent | Specialty |
|-------|-----------|
| **Frontend Developer** | React, Vue, Angular, shadcn/ui, Core Web Vitals, pixel-perfect implementation |
| **Backend Architect** | API design, database architecture, scalability, microservices |
| **Mobile App Builder** | React Native, Flutter, Expo, iOS/Android, App Store deployment |
| **AI Engineer** | ML models, deployment, AI integration, LLM fine-tuning, RAG pipelines |
| **DevOps Automator** | CI/CD, infrastructure automation, Docker, Cloudflare, monitoring |
| **Rapid Prototyper** | POCs, MVPs, hackathons, vibe coding, 2.5h full-stack MVPs |
| **Senior Developer** | Laravel/Livewire, SOLID, DDD, Clean Architecture, refactoring legacy |
| **Security Engineer** | Pentesting, VPS hardening, jailbreak testing, OWASP Top 10 |

### 🎨 Design Division (7 agents)

| Agent | Specialty |
|-------|-----------|
| **UI Designer** | Design systems, shadcn/ui, Tailwind, Figma→Code, dark/light mode |
| **UX Researcher** | User testing, behavior analysis, personas, analytics, heuristics |
| **MUX Architect** | CSS architecture, motion design systems, developer-friendly foundations |
| **Brand Guardian** | Brand identity, tone of voice, guidelines, consistency policing |
| **Visual Storyteller** | Narratives, video, infographics, pitch decks, social media carousels |
| **Whimsy Injector** | Micro-interactions, Easter eggs, playful copy, delight moments |
| **Image Prompt Engineer** | Midjourney, DALL-E, Stable Diffusion, Flux, photography, art direction |

### 🟢 Business & Automation (9 agents)

| Agent | Specialty |
|-------|-----------|
| **Agent Architect** | Multi-agent architecture, orchestration, Hermes deployment |

---

## What's Included

- ✅ 24 complete SKILL.md files (YAML frontmatter + detailed markdown)
- ✅ Each agent has: Role, When to Use, Key Skills, Workflow, Known Pitfalls, Knowledge Graph connections
- ✅ Ready to install: `cp -r skills/* ~/.hermes/skills/`
- ✅ MIT License — free to use, modify, and resell
- ✅ Created by **Ziri Yahi**

## Quick Start

```bash
# 1. Clone or download
git clone https://github.com/ziri22/agency-roster.git

# 2. Install all agents
cp -r agency-roster/skills/* ~/.hermes/skills/

# 3. Restart Hermes
hermes restart
```

## Use in Hermes

Just mention what you need:

```
"Design a landing page"     → UI Designer activates
"Set up CI/CD pipeline"     → DevOps Automator activates  
"Create a mobile app"       → Mobile App Builder activates
"Test my app security"     → Security Engineer activates
```

## Requirements

- [Hermes Agent](https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com) installed
- Python 3.10+
- Ollama (local) or NVIDIA NIM (cloud) for AI models
